name: Knowledge Brain — Nightly Consolidation
description: Maintains knowledge graph freshness, detects conflicts, integrates daily learnings. Runs nightly at 03:30 CET.

payload.message:
Execute Knowledge Brain — Nightly Consolidation

Load and execute: ~/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/knowledge-brain.md

Complete all 5 phases:
1. FRESHNESS CHECK — scan 70_Mia/knowledge/, flag stale files (>14 days), verify core claims
2. CONFLICT DETECTION — compare people.md vs knowledge/contacts.md, projects.md vs ACTIVE.md
3. ORPHAN WATCH — find unlinked files in 70_Mia/, suggest archiving or linking
4. DAILY INTEGRATION — process today's daily note (if exists), extract facts/decisions/contacts, apply Memory-R1
5. BRIEF — summarize findings

Vault path: ~/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/System_OS/

Output:
- knowledge-freshness.log (or append to daily note)
- conflicts.md (if conflicts found)
- orphans.md (if orphans found)
- Updates to knowledge files (following Memory-R1)
- Brief summary appended to tomorrow's daily note

Success criteria:
✅ All 20 knowledge files checked
✅ Conflicts logged
✅ Orphans identified
✅ Daily note processed (if exists)
✅ Brief generated

ESTIMATED RUNTIME: 5-10 minutes
ESTIMATED COST: $0.10-0.30 per run (~$3-9/month)
